nasb.text: and by some that Elijah had appeared, and by others that one of the prophets of old had risen again.

esv.text: by some that Elijah had appeared, and by others that one of the prophets of old had risen.

cnv.text: 又有人說：“以利亞顯現了。”還有人說：“古時的一位先知復活了。”

ccb.text: 有人说：“以利亚显现了”，还有人说：“古代的某个先知复活了”。

csbs.text: 也有些人说：“以利亚显现了。”还有些人说：“古时候的一位先知复活了。”
